name: Mobile Autocomplete: Product Matches
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Optimizing mobile autocomplete with product matches helps you deliver effective search experiences on smaller screens where navigation efficiency is critical. When mobile shoppers see relevant product suggestions alongside search predictions, they can quickly verify that their search will yield results and often navigate directly to products, which helps improve mobile conversion rates and reduces friction in the mobile shopping journey."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile autocomplete with product matches balances visual product discovery with the practical constraints of mobile interfaces. By strategically displaying product images and search suggestions, you help mobile customers find products faster despite limited screen space, supporting better mobile conversion performance and reducing abandonment from frustrating mobile search experiences."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/97d036e-Mobile-Autocomplete_1_Product-Matches.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/97d036e-Mobile-Autocomplete_1_Product-Matches.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "2000", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Mobile Autocomplete with Product Matches", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "#1. Background"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For mobile, the fundamental requirement of the Autocomplete to simplify navigation becomes even more important. The limited "keyboard" size enhance the importance of trending searches & search suggestions. It is 26x times more common for the shopper to click on text rather than products."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product suggestions should hence be shown secondary, but can still serve a valuable role. For visual categories, the confirmation of the query leading to relevant results can outweigh the added distraction and nudge the shopper to the search results page."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "#2. Requirements"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to apply this module without customizations, there are a few things to keep in mind:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "API Response"}], "data-id": "api-response"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The default elements used in every autocomplete are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "product image"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "product title"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "product price"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Behavior of The Search Input"}], "data-id": "behavior-of-the-search-input"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This module is optimized for search bars that behave like an overlay to a page and therefore are not scrolling with the page. Therefore, the content within this module's autocomplete is going to be scrollable if the content is exceeding the screen's height."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "#3.
